name: Bananas Flambe
recipeIngredient: Vanilla ice cream – or your favorite
recipeInstructions:
1. In a sauté pan, melt the butter and sugar together over medium heat, stirring until the sugar has dissolved.
2. Continue to cook the mixture, allowing it to reach a light brown color without burning.
3. Once the sugar is lightly browned, add the lemon juice, orange juice, and Grand Marnier. Stir to combine.
4. Peel and halve the bananas, then sauté them in the sauce until they begin to soften.
5. Increase the heat slightly and carefully pour in the Grand Marnier. Use a long-handled flameproof spatula to ignite the alcohol if desired.
6. Serve hot over vanilla ice cream or your chosen dessert topping.
WARNING:
When preparing this exquisite dessert, use extreme caution. When igniting the alcohol, also exercise caution. Always remove the pan from the heat source when adding alcohol.
